roi.cta: I want to recover this money

items.title: 30-day trial
items.text: If the bot doesn't book a single appointment in the first month — we refund the setup fee in full.

items.title: No contracts
items.text: Pay monthly. Cancel whenever you want. No penalties, no hidden fees.

items.title: We set everything up
items.text: You don't touch any code. If something doesn't work — we fix it for free.

items.q: Do I need any technical skills?
items.a: None at all. We configure everything. You get a working system without touching any code.
Typically 7–14 days from the first conversation. In simpler cases, even faster.

items.q: What if a client asks a question the bot doesn't know?
items.a: The bot hands the conversation over to you and sends a notification. You step in only when really needed.

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes. No contracts, no penalties. Pay monthly and cancel whenever you want.
Repair shops, clinics, salons, language schools, renovation services. If you have clients who write or call — a bot will help.

items.q: How much does it really cost per month?
items.a: From 300 zł/month for the subscription plus a one-time setup fee. Most clients recover the cost within the first week.

problem.label: The problem
problem.subheadline: You're losing clients you never even see.

items.title: They write after hours
items.text: Someone wants to book at 10pm. No one replies. By morning they've called someone else.

items.title: They call when your hands are full
items.text: You're under a car or with a patient. The phone rings. Nobody answers. Another lost client.

items.title: You repeat yourself all day
items.text: How much does it cost? Do you have free slots? How do I get there? You answer the same questions 20 times a day.

services.label: Packages
services.title: Three things that work for you.
services.subtitle: Choose what eats most of your time — we'll handle the rest.

items.name: AutoReply
items.description: A client writes at 11pm asking about your prices. The bot replies in 10 seconds. You find out in the morning. Zero missed enquiries.

items.name: AutoLeads
items.description: Someone fills in a form on your website — you get an SMS with their details within 60 seconds. No lead slips through.

items.name: AutoAssistant
items.description: The phone rings while you're under a car or with a patient. The bot answers, handles questions, and books the appointment. Like having a receptionist — 10x cheaper.

steps.name: Conversation

steps.name: Configuration
steps.description: We configure everything. You don't touch any code. Delivered in 7–14 days.

steps.name: It works
steps.description: The system works 24/7. You see results. We handle maintenance and updates.
